data.narrative:
Vatn Systems is a Series A-stage frontier-technology company in Defense & Security, founded by Nelson Mills, currently valued at $300M post-money on $76.5M total raised. The valuation analysis draws on a peer universe of 10 comparable companies across the sector: 2 public (DRSHF, IDEAFORGE.NS) and 8 private firms at same or adjacent stage, including Vannevar Labs, Anduril Industries, and Castelion.

Two valuation methods were applied. Stage-progression modeling applies a 2.0x step-up multiplier typical of Series A-to-next-stage advancement, yielding $600M. Peer-median analysis across 9 same-sector comparables identifies a median valuation of $1.0B, with a range spanning $60M to $1.5B; five named peers (Vannevar Labs, Dream Security, Harmattan AI, Castelion, Defense Unicorns) represent the Series B cohort at $1.0B–$1.5B. The stage-progression and peer-median approaches diverge meaningfully, reflecting uncertainty around growth trajectory and market positioning.

Triangulation across both methods supports a valuation range of $510M (low) to $1.1B (high), with a median of $800M. The current $300M valuation sits below this range, suggesting potential upside, though key uncertainties remain: execution risk on product roadmap, competitive intensity within the defense-tech sector, and regulatory/procurement timelines specific to defense applications.
